name: Turkey Soup Continental
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare roux in a saucepan by melting butter.
2. In a large soup pot, sauté onions with melted butter until translucent.
3. Add turkey, potatoes, celery, and broth to the pot.
4. Simmer until vegetables are tender-crisp.
5. Stir in the prepared roux.
6. Add corn, cream, and seasonings to the pot.
7. Heat thoroughly, stirring occasionally.
8. Garnish with parsley and serve with crusty rolls.
